description:
A Claude Code skill + thin Django management command.

SKILL (.claude/skills/sync-gmail.md):
/sync-gmail [--days 30] [--dry-run] [--account enterprise|zinc]
- Uses gmail-enterprise MCP to search HDFC alert emails
- Extracts: date, amount, direction, reference_number, narration, gmail_message_id
- Fetches party list from DB, fuzzy-matches narrations (confidence threshold 0.65)
- Calls stage_gmail_payments management command with structured JSON
- Reports staged / skipped / unmatched summary table

COMMAND (finance/management/commands/stage_gmail_payments.py):
- Pure DB layer, no Gmail logic
- Deduplicates: skips if Payment.reference_number exists or ApprovalRequest.metadata.gmail_message_id already pending
- Creates ApprovalRequest per transaction via existing governance.services.create_approval_request()
- --dry-run and --clear-staged flags

Zero new pip dependencies. No changes to existing files.

Full plan at: plans/gmail-payment-sync.md
title: Gmail → Payment sync: /sync-gmail skill + stage_gmail_payments command
